notes: Representative Commander deck fixtures used for legality, parser, and analysis tests. Each entry references a sibling .txt file containing a pasted-decklist style card list with explicit Commander, Mainboard, and optional Sideboard sections. Color identity, banlist intent, and power band are recorded to make legality and analysis assertions stable. Power bands span precon, casual, upgraded, and high_power so deterministic scoring can be reviewed against representative builds.

decks.name: Korlash Mono-Black Zombies (Precon Band)
decks.intent: Stock-precon-band mono-black zombies build: minimal staples, no fast-mana stack beyond Sol Ring, no tutors, no compact combos. Used as the low-power benchmark for deterministic scoring.

decks.name: Omnath Mono-Green Stompy
decks.intent: Legal mono-green casual ramp/stompy build. Uses no banned cards.

decks.name: Atraxa Superfriends Upgraded
decks.intent: Legal four-color superfriends upgraded build. Uses no banned cards.

decks.name: Krenko Goblin Tribal
decks.intent: Legal mono-red goblin tribal aggro build for parser and ownership tests.

decks.name: Najeela 5-Color High Power
decks.intent: High-power five-color benchmark with the legal-under-current-banlist fast-mana stack, full tutor suite, Thoracle/Consultation/Tainted-Pact compact combo line, dense counter/protection/wipe density, and stax + extra-turn + mass-land-denial salt drivers. Used as the upper benchmark for deterministic scoring.

decks.name: Tymna + Thrasios cEDH (Thoracle Consultation)
decks.intent: cEDH-shaped four-color partner deck (Tymna + Thrasios) with the canonical Thoracle/Consultation/Tainted-Pact win line, the full Game-Changers fast-mana + tutor stack legal under the current banlist (Mana Vault, Mox Diamond, Chrome Mox, Lion's Eye Diamond, Ancient Tomb), Bolas's Citadel, The One Ring, Smothering Tithe, Necropotence, Rhystic Study, dense counter/protection density, and stax pressure (Drannith Magistrate, Opposition Agent, Trinisphere, Grand Abolisher). Used as the Bracket 5 cEDH benchmark for deterministic placement.

decks.name: Atraxa With Banned Card
decks.intent: Intentionally illegal: includes Mana Crypt (banned in Commander) to exercise banlist regression checks.

decks.name: Krenko Singleton Violation
decks.intent: Intentionally illegal: contains 4 copies of Goblin Piledriver (non-basic, non-singleton-exempt) to exercise singleton checks.

decks.name: Krenko Off-Color
decks.intent: Intentionally illegal: mono-red commander but mainboard contains Counterspell (blue) to exercise color identity checks.
